# Decision Note: decision-title

## Status

Proposed | Accepted | Superseded

## Date

YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What problem or constraint triggered this decision?

## Decision

What was chosen?

## Rationale

Why this option over alternatives?

## Consequences

Expected benefits, tradeoffs, and risks.

## Evidence

Code paths, tests, benchmarks, or references used.

## Validation

Commands or checks that confirm the decision is working.

## Links

Related notes and affected files.
